Radiobutton Group

Group radio buttons for single-select choices.

Form
Default
HTML
<lyte-radiobutton-group>
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-name="group">Small</lyte-radiobutton>
    <lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-name="group">Medium</lyte-radiobutton>
    <lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-name="group">Large</lyte-radiobutton>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton-group>
